jobs.label: frontdoor_split
jobs.prompt:
ROADMAP: roadmap.refactor.frontdoor.read.write.split — Split frontdoor admission from status observability.

Read surfaces/api/rest.py and the workflow frontdoor handlers. The frontdoor currently mixes run admission (accepting new workflow submissions) with status observability (polling run state). Split these into two separate handler modules:
- surfaces/api/handlers/workflow_admission.py — handles workflow submission
- surfaces/api/handlers/workflow_status.py — handles status polling and result retrieval

Ensure the router in rest.py routes to the correct module. Keep backward compatibility on HTTP paths. Submit code change summary via praxis_submit_code_change.

jobs.label: operator_kernel
jobs.prompt:
ROADMAP: roadmap.refactor.operator.frontdoor.kernel — Extract shared operator frontdoor kernel.

Read surfaces/api/operator_write.py and surfaces/mcp/tools/operator.py. Both duplicate input normalization, env resolution, and error wrapping. Extract the shared kernel into a new surfaces/api/_operator_kernel.py module with: normalize_params(), resolve_env(), wrap_error(). Both surfaces import from the kernel. Submit code change summary via praxis_submit_code_change.

jobs.label: provider_contract_split
jobs.prompt:
ROADMAP: roadmap.refactor.provider.contract.separation — Separate provider catalog from transport contracts.

Read the provider-related modules. Provider catalog (what models exist, their capabilities) is mixed with transport contracts (how to call them). Create:
- runtime/provider_catalog.py — model metadata, cap_ columns, catalog reads
- runtime/provider_transport_contracts.py — request/response contracts per provider
Update imports. Submit code change summary via praxis_submit_code_change.

jobs.label: query_router_split
jobs.prompt:
ROADMAP: roadmap.refactor.query.domain.router.split — Split workflow query handler by domain.

Read surfaces/api/handlers/ for query-related handlers. The workflow query handler responds to multiple domains (run state, job state, receipts, bugs, status). Split into domain-specific handlers:
- handlers/query_runs.py
- handlers/query_jobs.py
- handlers/query_receipts.py
Wire up in rest.py router. Submit code change summary via praxis_submit_code_change.

jobs.label: surface_unification
jobs.prompt:
ROADMAP: roadmap.refactor.workflow.surface.unification — Unify workflow launch and status surfaces.

Read surfaces/api/rest.py and the workflow-runs handlers. The /workflow-runs POST (launch) and /workflow-runs/{id}/status GET (status) use different code paths with duplicated context-building logic. Unify the response envelope format and extract shared context-building into surfaces/api/handlers/_workflow_context.py. Both handlers import from it. Submit code change summary via praxis_submit_code_change.
